title: phyllanthus niruri var. genuinus
intro: Phyllanthus niruri var. genuinus, also known as Stonebreaker or Chanca piedra, is a plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family and is commonly found in tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Phyllanthus niruri var. genuinus include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant, which are attributed to its high levels of flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat kidney stones, gallstones, and liver and kidney disorders, as well as its ability to reduce blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus niruri var. genuinus can be made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, which are often used to support kidney and liver health, as well as to aid in the treatment of various digestive issues.
